prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.8 kg; Height 170.5 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 9.2%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 224mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 205mg/dL; current 234mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.7kg; 9 months ago 74.1kg; 6 months ago 68.7kg; 3 months ago 70.1kg; current 69.8kg), Height (12 months ago 170.5cm; 9 months ago 170.5cm; 6 months ago 170.5cm; 3 months ago 170.5cm; current 170.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 37U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 36U/L), AST (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 41U/L; current 39U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 425mg/g; 9 months ago 415mg/g; 6 months ago 596mg/g; 3 months ago 665mg/g; current 605mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.4g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
